TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_LaMarcus_Aldridge, title = LaMarcus_Aldridge, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/LaMarcus_Aldridge} }

S.FORM: LaMarcus Aldridge kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, LaMarcus Aldridge, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
LaMarcus Aldridge kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, LaMarcus Aldridge, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lamarʦ~ʨus~ɕ al*ri*ɣe kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lamarʦ~ʨus~ɕ al*ri*ɣe, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
